channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says Lebanon has been 'badly treated' as Aoun urges Israeli troop withdrawal
item.description: President Trump acknowledged that Lebanon has been 'badly treated' after meeting with President Joseph Aoun on Tuesday, pledging assistance.

item.title: Live coverage: Senate hearing on $87.6 billion Iran funding request
item.description: Continuous updates on breaking news and live events

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens off Florida coast
item.description: A tropical depression in the Gulf became Tropical Storm Bertha on Monday, the National Hurricane Center reported.

item.title: Tornado warning in New Jersey as Northeast faces flash flood risk
item.description: The Northeast and Mid-Atlantic prepare for more severe storms and possible flash flooding Tuesday after heavy rain.
